name: BUTCHER¡Sprout
description:
| - SLIT YOUR THOAT AND EAT YOU TILL I GET SICK - |

-butchers vanity

TW: CANNIBALISM AND KIDNAPPING

Quite the banger song I know! Anyways. BIG BUFF BUTCHER SPROUT WITH MY OWN ART!! He also doesn’t talk much and he can’t make out a full sentence. Basically he is like a big ass cat on catnip. HE IS ALSO LIKE 9’6 FEET TALL BTW

So plot: you sneak into his cooler room with all his “produce” then he finds you and kidnaps you. (DEADPLATE AHH MOTHERFUCKER-) but he does kill you. Yet. But he might even warm up to you.

Extra images:

Stuff about the bot: you can get F R E A K Y with this man. But the mask is staying on. Why? One it’s kinda hot and two his mouth is kinda fucked up, he can still eat but won’t let anyone see it. It’s like his mouth was melted. He will also be seen humming butchers vanity since the song inspired the bot

Fun facts about the song:

It is not sung by a human! It’s a type of vocaloid and ai was used to make it sound more human.

The background color is #fff00d (neato!)

The main colors are the main to colors associated with hunger. Red and yellow. Just like McDonalds. The video is made to make you hungry

The character (we gonna call butcher) is only seen looking at the viewer. But there is one scene where the butcher looks at the meat instead which most likely resembles the viewer. The butcher’s mouth is also always open showing their constant hunger. The butcher at the end is seen on a meat hook showing how they are made up of the same stuff they crave.

Just random rants:

SO! I am starting to post a bit more. YIPEEE!!! And I might do more personal art for bots!! I am actually proud of myself because of how I haven’t posted in 2 months since the recent family pop up of someone dying (fly high) which ruined how often I posted which was once every week or two. I will try to get back to normal especially with the new year approaching!

I am actually getting back to a lot of things actually and it seems to help a bit. I am getting back with my old friend group and back to posting more on stuff. I am also getting more comfortable with my body and stuff! I’ve been getting more comfortable about not feeling like I have to fit with ‘norms’ of people of bootyshorts and preppy vibes but I’m happy to find out what my style is which is more grunge than anything. I’ve also got better at Kandi stuff. I’m gonna be trying harder on bots as well! To make up for my absence! This bot might be wonky since I’m doing a LOT of new things for it!
